---
# Single source of truth for the CV.
# Renders to two committed artifacts via ./build.sh:
#   ../public/cv_adrianoii.pdf          (download)
#   ../src/content/cv.generated.html (injected into the /cv page)
#
# Entry layout convention: a bold/italic line followed by a right-aligned
# `[date]{.cv-meta}` span. The `\hfill`{=latex} pushes it right in the PDF;
# CSS (.cv-content) floats the span right on the web. One source, both formats.
format:
  pdf:
    geometry: "margin=0.55in"
    fontsize: 11pt
    colorlinks: true
    linkcolor: sunsetlink
    urlcolor: sunsetlink
    citecolor: sunsetlink
    include-before-body: header.tex
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage[default]{sourcesanspro}
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \usepackage{xcolor}
        \usepackage{enumitem}
        % Sunset palette from the website (deepened so it stays legible on white)
        \definecolor{sunsetgold}{HTML}{C8860B}
        \definecolor{sunsetorange}{HTML}{F2520D}
        \definecolor{sunsetlink}{HTML}{C2410C}
        \titleformat{\section}{\large\scshape\bfseries\color{sunsetgold}}{}{0em}{}[{\color{sunsetorange}\titlerule}]
        \titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{10pt}{3pt}
        \setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
        \setlength{\parskip}{2pt}
        \setlist[itemize]{leftmargin=1.3em,topsep=1pt,itemsep=1pt,parsep=0pt}
        \pagenumbering{gobble}
bibliography: publications.bib
csl: numeric.csl
link-citations: true
---

# Education

**University of Massachusetts Lowell**`\hfill`{=latex}[Lowell, MA, USA]{.cv-meta}

*Third-year Computer Science PhD student — GPA 4.0/4.0*`\hfill`{=latex}[Jan 2024 – Now]{.cv-meta}

**Federal University of Mato Grosso (UFMT)**`\hfill`{=latex}[Cuiabá, MT, Brazil]{.cv-meta}

*B.Sc. in Computer Science — GPA 3.62/4.0 (8.84/10.0)*`\hfill`{=latex}[2017 – 2021]{.cv-meta}

# Research Experience

**Graduate Research Assistant**`\hfill`{=latex}[2024 – Now]{.cv-meta}

*University of Massachusetts Lowell — advised by Prof. Paul Downen*`\hfill`{=latex}[Lowell, MA, USA]{.cv-meta}

- Study how codata and copatterns can bridge the functional and object-oriented
  paradigms, giving programmers a declarative way to define infinite and
  effectful objects.
- Developing **CoPy**, a Python language extension that brings copattern-based
  object-oriented programming to Python.
- Contributed to **CoScheme** [@coscheme], a Racket/Scheme macro library for
  compositional copatterns backed by a sound equational theory.

**Undergraduate Research Assistant**`\hfill`{=latex}[2020 – 2021]{.cv-meta}

*Federal University of Mato Grosso*`\hfill`{=latex}[Cuiabá, MT, Brazil]{.cv-meta}

- Evaluated audio data-augmentation methods for bird-call classification.

**Research Assistant**`\hfill`{=latex}[2020 – 2021]{.cv-meta}

*Federal University of Mato Grosso*`\hfill`{=latex}[Cuiabá, MT, Brazil]{.cv-meta}

- Co-created **RSDD** [@rsdd], a satellite-imagery dataset for modeling
  deforestation in the Brazilian state of Mato Grosso.

# Teaching Experience

**Undergraduate Teaching Assistant**`\hfill`{=latex}[2018 – 2021]{.cv-meta}

*Federal University of Mato Grosso*`\hfill`{=latex}[Cuiabá, MT, Brazil]{.cv-meta}

- Designed problem sets and led recitations and office hours across five courses:
  Discrete Mathematics, Data Structures, Theory of Computation, Algorithms, and
  Compilers.

# Industry Experience

**Software Engineer**`\hfill`{=latex}[2021 – 2022]{.cv-meta}

*Acerto*`\hfill`{=latex}[Remote · Belo Horizonte, MG, Brazil]{.cv-meta}

- Built in-house tools that automated workflows for non-technical teams and
  optimized database queries at a debt-collection company.
<!-- stack: C#, Python, PostgreSQL -->

**Software Engineer Intern**`\hfill`{=latex}[2018 – 2021]{.cv-meta}

*NUTI-IC*`\hfill`{=latex}[Cuiabá, MT, Brazil]{.cv-meta}

- Developed a health-surveillance data system and public-health dashboards for
  the Mato Grosso State Health Department.
- Built a report-management system for POLITEC-MT, the state forensic-services
  department.
<!-- stack: C#, .NET, ASP.NET MVC, jQuery, SQL Server; POLITEC: Java, Spring, React, PostgreSQL -->

# Awards & Honors

**ICPC South America / Brazil Finalist**`\hfill`{=latex}[2021]{.cv-meta}

**Outstanding Graduating Student (*Aluno Destaque*)**`\hfill`{=latex}[2020/2]{.cv-meta}

*Federal University of Mato Grosso*

<!-- test scores (uncomment to include):
TOEFL iBT 105 (R 28, L 29, S 22, W 26) · GRE 317 (V 155, Q 162, AW 3.5)
-->

# Technical Skills

Languages
:   Rocq/Coq, Lean, Haskell, Rust, Python, C#, C, and JavaScript

Tools & Databases
:   PostgreSQL, Microsoft SQL Server, .NET, Git, and QGIS

Natural Languages
:   Portuguese (native) and English (fluent)

# Publications

::: {#refs}
:::
